title: Aurora World 31294 Mini Flopsie Golden Retriever Plush Toy , Brown
features: From Aurora’s highly popular Mini Flopsies Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
Realistic animal with soft and cuddly bean bag bodies.
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: From the manufacturer Aurora World 31294 Mini Flopsie Golden Retriever Plush Toy This golden retriever pupp plush toy boasts a gloriously soft, huggable coat and cute puppy features! From our Mini Flopsies collection comes all-new additions to its popular range! These floppy, bean filled animal companions are sure to delight children of all ages with their shiny coats and funky feautures! Wash Instructions: Hand Wash, Air Dry Age grade: All Ages About us Established in 1981, Aurora World offers an extensive range of branded products for children and adults. The company sells its product lines via a wide variety of retailers including major zoos, department stores, high-end toy stores and top gift chains, as well as hospital gift shops, fine florists, candy stores and gift/stationary stores worldwide. Aurora is known in the industry for its incredibly high quality products, range of diverse offerings.
